title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Panalpina India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Panalpina India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Panalpina India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Panalpina India:
Panalpina India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Panalpina India!
